nasb.text: They have gaped at me with their mouth, They have slapped me on the cheek with contempt; They have massed themselves against me.

esv.text: Men have gaped at me with their mouth; they have struck me insolently on the cheek; they mass themselves together against me.

cnv.text: 他們向我大大張嘴， 以蔑視的態度打我的臉頰， 聯合一起攻擊我。

ccb.text: 他们嘲笑我， 轻蔑地掴我的脸， 联合起来攻击我。
